title: Portfolio Case Studies and Technical Decision Narratives · Opportunity Brief: Quality Evidence
summary: A project page celebrates features and tools but omits the user need, personal decisions, alternatives, failures, verification, accessibility, security, impact limits, and maintenance state. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the quality evidence increment in evidence-linked project case-study set. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice,…
objectives: Connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence.
Show a reproduced failure, competing hypotheses, causal repair, regression evidence, and what the repair did not prove.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Quality Evidence · Theory Quality Evidence
steps.instruction:
theory case — A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Quality Evidence contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Quality Evidence · Theory Quality Evidence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence. For Predict Quality Evidence · Theory Quality Evidence, keep Quality Evidence connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. content.title: Commit before feedback
content.text: Choose from the stated data before opening the worked model. Record which Quality Evidence condition decided your prediction.

content.label: Authority to consult after committing
content.value: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines — Controls accessible portfolio and application artifacts while distinguishing automated checks from knowledgeable human and assistive-technology evaluation.

hints: For Predict Quality Evidence · Theory Quality Evidence, name the learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, truthful claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer boundary, Quality Evidence precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Predict Quality Evidence · Theory Quality Evidence, trace this concrete input and predict targeting, source, evidence, contribution, access, privacy, consent, process, decision, rejection, repair, follow-up, and learner-controlled transfer evidence before reviewing it: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The theory variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

For Predict Quality Evidence · Theory Quality Evidence, challenge the documented misconception with changed-candidate, target-role, source-date, jurisdiction, audience, access, privacy, consent, process-state, interview, offer, rejection, repair, and learner-controlled transfer evidence: One automated score can establish broad quality conformance.

options.text: Connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
One automated score can establish broad quality conformance. That claim fails the predict quality evidence boundary for Quality Evidence.

For predict quality evidence, apply Quality Evidence without its stated preconditions, omit the evidence-linked project case-study set trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Quality Evidence for evidence-linked project case-study set.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Quality Evidence while producing evidence-linked project case-study set.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A polished project story lists features and tools but invents user impact, hides failures, and links no accessibility, security, changed-case, or operations evidence. The worked example variation 3 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence. A defensible solution applies Quality Evidence, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to evidence-linked project case-study set.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-quality-evidence — Connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-quality-evidence
decision-evidence: Connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: One automated score can establish broad quality conformance. This fails the Quality Evidence contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG 2.2 Recommendation; ISO IEC 40500:2025) — Controls accessible portfolio and application artifacts while distinguishing automated checks from knowledgeable human and assistive-technology evaluation.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Connect accessibility, security, privacy, testing, operations, and recovery claims to exact automated and human evidence.
